## Meeting Purpose

[Daily standup to discuss progress, blockers, and updates on content marketing activities for growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Traffic slightly down but expected to remain consistent with June; mobile website issues discovered](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [New prophecy articles planned around AI agents and top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Content creation challenges with Claude AI, but workarounds discussed](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Publishing issues persist, but solutions are in progress with Daryl](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [Continuing current approach, with emphasis on mentioning ebook for "data as a team support" campaign articles](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [New prophecy articles planned, focusing on AI agents and top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Saskia working through topic outlines, with slight uncertainty on "best practices" article](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

### Traffic Analysis

  - [July traffic slightly down but expected to match June (2 days remaining in July)](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [No significant drops in individual blog posts or click rates detected](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Mobile version of website has some issues, potentially impacting traffic](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Core updates may be affecting traffic; team to monitor closely](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

### Technical Investigations

  - [Extensive data digging performed (Looker, GA4, Search Console)](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [No bot activity detected on the website (addressing client concern from previous meeting)](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Mobile website issues discovered, fixing could improve traffic](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)

### Content Creation Challenges

  - [Claude AI (mandated by Daryl) producing repetitive sentence structures](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Ehtisham suggested using Claude for replies only, not direct Canvas edits](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Saskia to implement feedback on previous document at week's end](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)

### Publishing Issues

  - [Persistent problems with publishing blogs, Saskia unable to stay logged in](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Daryl working on a solution, progress seems promising](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)

### Team Updates

  - [Jess has left the company (as of last Friday)](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Saskia to continue working on article outlines and generation](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Ehtisham to propose new prophecy articles after completing AIMBIT meeting agenda](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Monitor traffic closely, especially in relation to core updates](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Implement feedback on previous document (Saskia, end of week)](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Follow up with Daryl on publishing issue resolution](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Saskia to send "best practices" article outline to Ehtisham for review before generating content](https://fathom.video/share/VWLxbDqpUmhp5UqCi5DDz4sCnCoqyFr7?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
